title: Add a cron entry to Oban.Plugins.Cron config
prompt: Write an Oban configuration snippet for `config/runtime.exs` that sets up `Oban.Plugins.Cron` with a single entry: run `MyApp.Workers.NightlyCleanup` at 3:00 AM every day. Do not override the default timezone (stay on Etc/UTC to avoid the tz dependency). Include the repo and a single `:default` queue with concurrency 10. Write to `config/runtime.exs`.
tier_rationale: Single crontab entry in UTC; no timezone dependency to reason about.
